name: amazon-product-discovery-engine-root
description: Root launcher: installs both client & server and runs them together

scripts.install-all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspaces --if-present || (npm --prefix server run dev & npm --prefix client run dev)
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c magenta,cyan "npm --prefix server start" "npm --prefix client run dev"
